feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Best practice - SAP Public Cloud - settings for Information Lifecycle Management (1KA) Settings
entry.content:
I am currently working on a project that involves configuring the settings for Information Lifecycle Management (1KA). Given the critical nature of these settings, I wanted to reach out to see if you or anyone in your network has any experience or detailed insights with this specific scope item.

As the SAP Standard settings are empty I'm searching for best practices for the SAP FI objects in SAP Public Cloud. 

I wanted to ask if we have any best practice settings or configuration in the area of finance objects a previous customer project that could serve as a reference. This would be extremely helpful and save valuable time. Any advice, best practices, or resources you could share regarding Information Lifecycle Management (1KA) would be immensely helpful and greatly appreciated!!

entry.title: Dropdown filtering in SAC
entry.content:
SAP Managed Tags: SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer

Hi community

I am new to SAC.

I want to introduce a dropdown filtering menu in my story. I succeded in populating the dropdown using these lines of code in the onInitialization() function : 


var Inspectors_list = Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("Don_ordre.Inspecteur");

if (Inspectors_list.length > 0) 
{
for (var i=0;i<Inspectors_list.length; i++){
Dropdown_1.addItem(Inspectors_list[i].id,Inspectors_list[i].description);
}}
 
Then i proceeded to to adding the following lines of code in the Dropdown_1 - onSelect() :

var x = Dropdown_1.getSelectedKey();
console.log(x);
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Don_ordre.Inspecteur",x);


The filter is not working correctly and i do not understand why.
There is only two values in the dropdown once selected returns values , all the others returns zero.

Also i figured if it's an issue with my model , why would two values from the dropdown filter correctly and the others won't.

 

 

Also some screenshots from the modeler

entry.title: adjust production order qty to reflect delivery tolerance
entry.content:
Hi MRP Experts,

We are operating in an MTO environment, where our customers requesting us always to ship the full order qty with a tolerance of -0%/+10%. Unfortunatly MRP is triggering the nominal production order qty to the nominal sales order qty and component scrap of the BOM is in 30% of the cases not sufficient to achieve nominal sales order qty.

I do not wnat to add mor scrap to the BOM but would rather prefer to set the nominal production order qty on the upper end of the sales order tolerance to ensure I maximize sales and do not bother the customer with shorts.

What is the best way to achieve such?

Thx

Matt

entry.title: SavedValues in hybris
entry.content:
Lets Say your Model is: TraineeUser

Provide PK of instance for which data is needed.

 

fss = spring.getBean("flexibleSearchService") ;
modelService = spring.getBean("modelService")
queryString =select {sv.pk} from {SavedValues as sv join TraineeUser as t on {t.pk}={sv.modifiedItem} } where {sv.modifiedItem} = '87871234564'

SavedValuesModel savedValueModel=fss.search(queryString).result[0];
TraineeUserModel target=(TraineeUserModel) savedValueModel.getModifiedItem();

println("User: "+savedValueModel.getUser().getUid())
println("store: "+target.getStore().getName())
println("Email: "+target.getEmail())
println("Time: "+target.getCreationtime())

 

@Hybris @SAPcommerce

entry.title: BPEM created successfully but assign to the wrong group. Change the config, but not showing in BDEX
entry.content:
Hello All,

Need your help: -

The BPEM was successfully created but assigned to the incorrect group. We have updated the configuration, but it is not reflecting in BDEX (/BTI/BWC). Additionally, when we simulate with all parameters, all agents are displayed correctly.

Kind Regards,

Subhas

entry.title: My Object Page V4 is empty , except Header. Even i can't see the edit and delete options too.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have developed a RAP Application in my project , a Table zbumamapping should be exposed as a List view with object page. Every thing is fine . But when i am clicking on any entry on the screen , the object page doesn't have any fields. It is empty. The service i used is V4. I can see only the header in the object page. 

Below is the screen shot of the app i created. 

When i click on an item , the next object page is empty ( except company code as header ) , also there are no edit and delete options on screen.

I have maintained the below metadata extensions.

 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE

 

@UI : { headerInfo:{

typeName: 'Mapping Table',

typeNamePlural: 'Mapping Table',

title: {

type: #STANDARD,

label: 'Mapping Table',

value: 'Companycode'

},

description.value: 'Companycode' }

}

 

 

 

@Search.searchable: true

annotate view ZC_BIMAMAPPING

with

{

 

@UI.facet: [{ id: 'Mapping Data',

purpose: #STANDARD,

type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,

label: 'Mapping Data',

//targetQualifier: 'HeaderItems',

position: 10 } ]

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 10 }],

identification: [{ position: 10 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 10 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Company Code'

Companycode;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 20 }],

identification: [{ position: 20 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]}

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Mapping Type'

Maptype;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 30 }],

identification: [{ position: 30 }],

selectionField: [{ position: 30 }] }

// identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Source Value'

Sourcevalue;

 

@UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 40 }],

identification: [{ position: 40 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}]}

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Target Value'

Targetvalue;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 50 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created By'

created_by;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 60 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Created At'

created_at;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 70 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed By'

last_changed_by;

 

@UI: {

identification: [{ position: 80 }] }

//identification: [{qualifier: 'HeaderItems'}] }

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Last Changed At'

last_changed_at;

 

//@UI.hidden: true

//ExcelRowNumber;

 

}

.

 

 Even though i cant able to view the complete object page and edit it. Please let me know whether i need to implement any code ? Mine is a Managed scenario.

Is there something we need to do in the BAS side too to enable the object view?

@Andre_Fischer  I saw you helping many in RAP Abap applications. Can you help me too. 

BR,

Vamsi Krishna Busi,

8867784916.

entry.title: how to show two currency in one PO
entry.content: My client's base ccy is INR, the purchase is done in EUR to which a freight charge was included in USD, the client is asking to include that USD in the PO, but as per SAP we can only display only header ccy. Can anyone suggest the correct procedure to tackle this problem if it is actually possible.

entry.title: How to pass Multiple Values to POST json
entry.content:
Hello,

How to pass multiple values for a particular field to OData POST request

entry.title: Requirement Gathering Questionnaire
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Shortly this week we are going to visit a client place , who is interested in opting  SAP S4 HANA private cloud  solution, as the client is currently using SAP ECC, Please help me with finding requirement gathering questionnaire for all modules in order to capture their AS - IS Process in a structured way and efficiently document TO- BE Process in SAP,

 

Thanks a Lot,

entry.title: RFC Timeout Failure for PO Rejection from FIORI app - workflow
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are using our own Workflow tasks for PO approval and rejection .

It was working fine before upgrade but after we moved from 1909 to 2023 , The Approval option is working fine but the Rejection option is getting the RFC Timeout error although the RFC is working fine.

/IWFND/ERROR_LOG shows 'RFC call was not successful because of system failure 'Time limit exceeded''.

Did Anyone face issue like this before , any help will be appreciated .

Thank You !

entry.title: how can to adding the ads in appgyver
entry.content: How do I add ads inside the app on the appgyver platform?

entry.title: Debug ACR Report
entry.content: My ACR report is not returning any data and I want to debug to understand the issue, but SRF_REPORTING_TAST OData service is not getting triggered. Tried the change set methods and create entity and update entity methods. Any suggestion?

entry.title: IW13 Program "SAPLCHVW" has exceeded the maximum uninterrupted runtime hence, process is terminated
entry.content:
hope someone can assist us with this, every time we execute the IW13 report we are unable to proceed with the report due to the error mentioned above. 

I have also attached the screenshot here.

entry.title: Problem to get the missing parts
entry.content:
I have a problem to get the missing parts, the parts are not assigned in SAP to the machine.

Production order number 103828914

entry.title: Problemas para visualizar autorizaciones en SAP Mobile
entry.content:
Estimados solicito de su ayuda hace unas semanas SAP Mobile ha dejado de actualizar las autorizaciones de   de venta solo me esta mostrando las del 2023 y no las actuales

Alguien me podría ayudar  , se renovó SSL y esta sin problemas .

gracias y me quedo atento a cualquier comentario.

entry.title: Can I update info prices of PO in massive?
entry.content: I would like to know if there is the possibility of updating purchase prices massive. That is, our suppliers offer us a price list with all the materials we buy from them and these prices vary every 6 months. We have suppliers from whom we buy up to 150 materials per month and updating the purchasing information material by material has been very tedious.

entry.title: Getting an error "UI API Server is unavailable; the installation process will not start"
entry.content:
HI,

When i logged in to sap applications i am getting an error  "UI API Server is unavailable; the installation process will not start". i have done reinstallations of sap b1 cliente agent but didn't help to resolve the error.

Please suggest

entry.title: Order Based Planning: Finite heuristic not generating planned order
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have setup Order base planning process using SAP7 and SDI for one of our business process. The integration of master data and txn data from ECC to IBP is working with use of SDI.

We are using Finite Heuristic method in the Supply planning run. It is generating the receipts for the externally procured item without any issue. 

However, the finite heuristic is not generating any receipts against demands ( sales order and forecast) at the manufacturing plant for the inhouse produced items. The valid resource with available capacity and the PDS data are successfully integrated from ECC to IBP.

In the Supply run profile , we have not set any constraints ( capacity, lot size etc.) and the source of supply for PDS is enabled. I am expecting a planned order, but it does not plan any thing nor indicates any clue in the log.

Appreciate if you can pl share your inputs.

Subh

entry.title: SAP SD Pricing Access Sequence
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am currently working on updating the SD Pricing Access Sequence and would like to make sure we have considered all aspects during development and testing so current operations will not be jeopardized.

I would appreciate it if you can share your thoughts on what should be considered, including the risks and other factors involved.

Thank you.

Jodie Feliz Racho

entry.title: Re: Why is doing batch without stock while doing POGI?
entry.content:
@mdgolamrabbani 

Please check and share your Batch Determination setup. It should be based on your settings.
